gate: ADR-047 Gate B2 — Proven Identity token parity

criteria.description: Byte-identical tokens/claims + identical verify/revocation decisions across a full A/B run.

httpLifecycle.detail: Result: IDENTICAL — identity HTTP + refresh/revocation byte-identical with shadow OFF vs ON
httpLifecycle.note: full login/verify/is-admin/refresh-rotation/replay/logout/logout-all, shadow OFF vs ON, byte-identical

refreshRevocationRepository.note: REAL legacy-vs-kernel comparisons over a live DB: refresh verify (valid/rotated/revoked) + repository reads — 100% parity, coverage > 0 (closes the declared-but-unexercised gap)

criteria.description: Socket authentication decisions identical with shadow OFF vs ON.

evidence.detail: Result: IDENTICAL — socket auth decisions byte-identical with shadow OFF vs ON

criteria.description: Cross-replica revocation timing matches the current Redis-backed behavior.
criteria.detail: Result: SKIPPED (set REDIS_URL in CI-with-Redis / staging to produce B2.2 evidence).
criteria.reason: requires ≥2 replicas + Redis (REDIS_URL). Skip-clean without it.

criteria.description: A staged rollback restores legacy authoritative with no client re-auth.
criteria.detail: Result: PASS — rollback-safety invariant holds (no client re-auth)
criteria.note: rollback-SAFETY invariant MEASURED PASS (a session minted before the flag flip stays valid after). Full authoritative-flag rollback completes in Phase 20.c when IDENTITY_AUTHORITATIVE is wired.

verdict: SUBSTANTIALLY MET — token/claims + HTTP + refresh/revocation + socket MEASURED PASS; rollback-safety MEASURED PASS (B2.3 PARTIAL — authoritative-flag rollback in 20.c). 1 criterion (cross-replica timing) UNAVAILABLE here (needs Redis/staging). Gate B2 is NOT fully MET; do NOT promote until the remaining evidence is produced in staging.
